title: Write "DOMINION Licenses" (Monster Hunter versions of "UNITE Licenses") for the following monsters - Chameleos, Gaismago…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Write "DOMINION Licenses" (Monster Hunter versions of "UNITE Licenses") for the following monsters - Chameleos, Gaismagorm, Malzeno, Shagaru Magala, Gore Magala, Thunder Serpent Narwa, Wind Serpent Ibushi, & Crimson Glow Valstrax. Each license should include the monster's difficulty, shop price, battle style, damage type, stats, abilities, skills, and dominion move. (Current battle styles: Attacker, All-Rounder, Defender, Supporter, & Speedster.)

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Chameleos
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Shop Price: 8000 Points
- Battle Style: Supporter
- Damage Type: Dragon, Poison
- Stats: 
  - Attack: Low
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: High
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Moderate), Fire (Weak), Water (Strong), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Stealth, Poison Breath
- Skills: Camouflage, Chameleonic Mastery, Poison-Enhanced Strikes
- Dominion Move: Chameleon's Mirage - Chameleos becomes invisible and launches a poisonous breath attack on all its enemies, causing continuous damage even after the move.

2. Gaismagorm
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 10000 Points
- Battle Style: All-Rounder
- Damage Type: Dragon, Blast
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Low
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Moderate), Fire (Weak), Water (Strong), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Blast Wave, Dragon Pulse
- Skills: Blast Mastery, Agile Predator, Dragon-Infused Strikes
- Dominion Move: Gai's Cataclysm - Gaismagorm unleashes a wave of Dragon energy and Blast explosions, dealing massive damage to all enemies and inflicting Blastblight.

3. Malzeno
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Shop Price: 8000 Points
- Battle Style: Defender
- Damage Type: Water, Ice
- Stats:
  - Attack: Medium
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: Low
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Water (Strong), Ice (Moderate), Fire (Weak), Thunder (Neutral), Dragon (Neutral)

- Abilities: Ice Armor, Geyser Spikes
- Skills: Defensive Mastery, Frosty Fortitude, Pressured Counterattacks
- Dominion Move: Frozen Torrent - Malzeno summons a massive icy tornado that deals Water and Ice damage to enemies, increasing its defense significantly.

4. Shagaru Magala
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 12000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Dragon, Frenzy
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: Low
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Strong), Fire (Weak), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Frenzied Assault, Dragon Breath
- Skills: Overwhelming Offense, Chaotic Infusion, Magala's Might
- Dominion Move: Shagaru's Frenzied Storm - Shagaru Magala unleashes a storm of frenzied Dragon energy, dealing massive Dragon damage, and inflicting the Frenzy virus on all enemies.

5. Gore Magala
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 9000 Points
- Battle Style: Speedster
- Damage Type: Dragon, Frenzy
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: Very High
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Moderate), Fire (Weak), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Frenzied Strikes, Dragon Roar
- Skills: Unleashed Fury, Gore's Celerity, Unpredictable Aggressor
- Dominion Move: Gore's Frenzied Outbreak - Gore Magala spreads its wings and envelops the battlefield in a cloud of Frenzy virus, boosting its speed and attack while inflicting the virus on all enemies.

6. Thunder Serpent Narwa
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 13000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Thunder
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: High
  - Elemental Resistances: Thunder (Strong), Water (Weak), Fire (Neutral), Dragon (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Thunderstorm, Lightning Strike
- Skills: Thundering Tempest, Aerostatic Ascendancy, Serpent's Wrath
- Dominion Move: Narwa's Tempestuous Descent - Thunder Serpent Narwa unleashes a vortex of thunderbolts, covering the entire battlefield and dealing Thunder damage to all enemies.

7. Wind Serpent Ibushi
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 13000 Points
- Battle Style: Supporter
- Damage Type: Wind, Dragon
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: High
  - Elemental Resistances: Wind (Strong), Dragon (Moderate), Fire (Neutral), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Wind Barrier, Dragon's Roar
- Skills: Soaring Serpent, Ibushi's Flight, Aerial Domination
- Dominion Move: Ibushi's Windstorm Barrage - Wind Serpent Ibushi summons a powerful windstorm, using its Wind and Dragon powers to protect teammates and cause continuous damage to enemies.

8. Crimson Glow Valstrax
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 15000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Dragon, Fire
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: Very High
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Fire (Strong), Dragon (Moderate), Water (Weak), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Supersonic Dive, Flaming Burst
- Skills: Crimson Ascension, Valstrax's Fury, Sonic Destruction
- Dominion Move: Crimson's Rocketing Reckoning - Crimson Glow Valstrax launches itself into the sky, breaking the sound barrier, and crashing down in a massive explosion of Fire and Dragon energy on its enemies.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Now write “DOMINION Licenses” for the following monsters - Alatreon, Behemoth, Kirin, Kulve Taroth, Lunastra, Namielle, Nergigante, Shara Ishvalda, Vaal Hazak, Xeno'Jiiva, Safi'jiiva, and Fatalis. Each license should include the monster’s difficulty, shop price, battle style, damage type, stats, abilities, skills, and dominion move. (Current battle styles: Attacker, All-Rounder, Defender, Supporter, & Speedster.)

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Alatreon
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 16000 Points
- Battle Style: All-Rounder
- Damage Type: Fire, Ice, Thunder
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Fire (Strong), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Strong), Ice (Strong), Dragon (Weak)

- Abilities: Elemental Conversion, Element Burst
- Skills: Juggernaut of Elements, Alatreon's Aegis, Elementalist Mastery
- Dominion Move: Elemental Cataclysm - Alatreon unleashes a powerful burst of all elements, dealing massive damage to all enemies and altering its elemental power based on the damage dealt.

2. Behemoth
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 13000 Points
- Battle Style: Defender
- Damage Type: Earth, Impact
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Very High
  - Speed: Low
  - Evasion: Low
  - Elemental Resistances: Earth (Strong), Fire (Neutral), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Dragon (Neutral)

- Abilities: Stone Skin, Meteor Strike
- Skills: Earth-Shattering Presence, Behemoth's Bulwark, Titanic Guardian
- Dominion Move: Ecliptic Meteor - Behemoth summons a gigantic meteor that crashes onto the battlefield, leaving a huge shockwave for tremendous Earth and Impact damage.

3. Kirin
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 9000 Points
- Battle Style: Speedster
- Damage Type: Thunder
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Low
  - Speed: Very High
  - Evasion: High
  - Elemental Resistances: Thunder (Strong), Water (Moderate), Fire (Weak), Dragon (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Thunderbolt, Lightning Speed
- Skills: Electric Evasion, Kirin's Quickness, Stormbringer
- Dominion Move: Thunderstorm Assault - Kirin generates a powerful storm of lightning that tears across the battlefield, dealing devastating Thunder damage to all enemies.

4. Kulve Taroth
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 15000 Points
- Battle Style: Supporter
- Damage Type: Fire
- Stats:
  - Attack: Medium
  - Defense: Very High
  - Speed: Low
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Fire (Strong), Water (Weak), Thunder (Moderate), Dragon (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Molten Gold, Treasure Armor
- Skills: Bounty of the Golden Goddess, Royal Reinforcement, Gilded Grasp
- Dominion Move: Mountains of Fortune - Kulve Taroth cascades molten gold onto the battlefield, uplifting allies with various buffs while covering enemies in heated liquid gold, dealing ongoing damage.

5. Lunastra
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 11000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Fire
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Fire (Strong), Water (Weak), Thunder (Neutral), Dragon (Neutral), Ice (Moderate)

- Abilities: Blue Flame, Meteor Charge
- Skills: Empress's Command, Lunastra's Wrath, Combusting Confluence
- Dominion Move: Lunar Supernova - Lunastra unleashes a colossal explosion of blue flames, targeting all enemies and dealing massive Fire damage with a high chance of causing Burn.

6. Namielle
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 11000 Points
- Battle Style: Supporter
- Damage Type: Water, Thunder
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: High
  - Elemental Resistances: Water (Strong), Thunder (Strong), Fire (Weak), Dragon (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Hydromancy, Electromancy
- Skills: Living Monsoon, Namielle's Enchantment, Aquatic Conductor
- Dominion Move: Oceanic Overlord - Namielle summons a massive storm, covering the battlefield in water and electricity, enhancing allies' attacks and causing Thunder and Water damage to enemies.

7. Nergigante
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 12000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Dragon, Impact
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: Low
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Moderate), Fire (Weak), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Spike Burst, Elderseal Strike
- Skills: Brutality Unleashed, Nergigante's Juggernaut, Primal Predator
- Dominion Move: Devastating Dive - Nergigante launches into the sky and crashes down onto the battlefield, throwing a massive shockwave of Dragon energy and spikes in all directions.

8. Shara Ishvalda
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 14000 Points
- Battle Style: Defender
- Damage Type: Wind, Sonic
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: Low
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Wind (Strong), Dragon (Moderate), Fire (Neutral), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral)

- Abilities: Wind Shield, Sonic Vibration
- Skills: Mountainous Majesty, Shara's Serenity, Grounded Gale
- Dominion Move: Earthquake Symphony - Shara Ishvalda triggers a massive earthquake and continuous shockwaves, burying enemies in their tracks and forcibly repositioning them.

9. Vaal Hazak
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 9000 Points
- Battle Style: All-Rounder
- Damage Type: Dragon, Effluvium
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Strong), Fire (Neutral), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Weak)

- Abilities: Miasma Beam, Effluvium Cloud
- Skills: Death's Grasp, Vaal's Vitality Drain, Grim Gravitation
- Dominion Move: Desolation of Death - Vaal Hazak releases a cloud of deadly effluvium, damaging enemies within it and sapping away their health, while Vaal Hazak heals by an equal amount.

10. Xeno'jiiva
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 15000 Points
- Battle Style: All-Rounder
- Damage Type: Dragon, Laser
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Strong), Fire (Moderate), Water (Moderate), Thunder (Moderate), Ice (Moderate)

- Abilities: Reality Alteration, World-Ending Beam
- Skills: Alien Resilience, Xeno's Ascendance, Intergalactic Conqueror
- Dominion Move: Planetary Annihilation - Xeno'jiiva channels its otherworldly power into a planet-shattering beam that engulfs the battlefield, dealing massive Dragon and Laser damage to all enemies.

11. Safi'jiiva
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 18000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Dragon, Energy
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: Low
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Strong), Fire (Weak), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Draining Bite, Energy Wave
- Skills: Safi's Energy Conversion, Dragon Drain, Ruler of the New World
- Dominion Move: Siphoning Apocalypse - Safi'jiiva unleashes an immense energy wave, draining the life force of all enemies and redistributing it amongst its allies in the form of damage boosts and healing.

12. Fatalis
- Difficulty: Expert
- Shop Price: 20000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Dragon, Fire
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: Low
  - Elemental Resistances: Dragon (Strong), Fire (Strong), Water (Weak), Thunder (Neutral), Ice (Neutral)

- Abilities: Flame Breath, Dragon Pulse
- Skills: Tyrannical Outburst, Fatalis's Invincibility, Black Dragon's Ferocity
- Dominion Move: Demise by Draconic Inferno - Fatalis gathers all its power for a cataclysmic attack, summoning a storm of Dragon energy and meteors of blazing flame, decimating all enemies on the battlefield.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: The last "DOMINION Licenses" are for Kushala Daora, Teostra, and Velkhana. Each license should include the monster’s difficulty, shop price, battle style, damage type, stats, abilities, skills, and dominion move. (Current battle styles: Attacker, All-Rounder, Defender, Supporter, & Speedster.)

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Kushala Daora
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 10000 Points
- Battle Style: Supporter
- Damage Type: Wind, Ice
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: High
  - Evasion: Very High
  - Elemental Resistances: Wind (Strong), Ice (Strong), Fire (Weak), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Neutral), Dragon (Weak)

- Abilities: Tornado Creation, Ice Shards
- Skills: Daora's Galeforce, Wind Barrier, Cryo-Kinesis
- Dominion Move: Tempest Warden - Kushala Daora invokes a massive whirlwind that protects its allies from ranged attacks, while simultaneously releasing a barrage of ice shards that deal Ice damage to its enemies.

2. Teostra
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 10000 Points
- Battle Style: Attacker
- Damage Type: Fire, Blast
- Stats:
  - Attack: Very High
  - Defense: Medium
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: High
  - Elemental Resistances: Fire (Strong), Water (Weak), Thunder (Neutral), Dragon (Weak), Ice (Moderate)

- Abilities: Flame Aura, Blast Powder
- Skills: Emperor's Rebuke, Incendiary Mane, Explosive Prowess
- Dominion Move: Destined Conflagration - Teostra releases an overwhelming blast of heat and flame that engulfs the battlefield, dealing massive Fire and Blast damage to foes, while applying a Fire and Blast boost on allies.

3. Velkhana
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Shop Price: 10000 Points
- Battle Style: All-Rounder
- Damage Type: Ice, Impact
- Stats:
  - Attack: High
  - Defense: High
  - Speed: Medium
  - Evasion: Medium
  - Elemental Resistances: Ice (Strong), Fire (Weak), Water (Neutral), Thunder (Moderate), Dragon (Neutral)

- Abilities: Ice Armor, Frozen Spike
- Skills: Crystalline Elegance, Velkhana's Veil, Glacial Punishment
- Dominion Move: Sovereignty of Frost - Velkhana summons an immense hailstorm and rains icicles down upon the battlefield, dealing massive Ice damage to enemies, while encasing allies in protective ice armor that increases defense and ice resistance.
